name: Emporio Alnino
nativeName: エンポリオ・アルニーニョ
description: __Height:__ 140 cm __Nationality:__ American Emporio is a young Stand User, born and living secretly in Green Dolphin Street Prison. He sympathizes with Jolyne and becomes one of her primary allies. Emporio's Stand, Burning Down the House, is a room comprising a secret, alternate space within Green Dolphin Street Prison, to which only he may grant entry. The room contains a number of useful, imperishable objects. ~!Emporio temporarily borrows the Stand "Weather Report" at the end of Stone Ocean.

name: Senpai
description: Senpai is a high school girl who is a skilled magician when no one is watching. However, she easily gets stage fright, is very embarrassed and clumsy, and often blunders her magic tricks when even one person watches her perform.

name: Yuuki Izumi
description: Izumi is a friendly, upbeat kid. He’s had terrible luck his entire life. If something can go wrong... he’ll probably wind up in the hospital. But he still thinks he’s the luckiest guy in the world, because Izumi has a girlfriend who is smart, sporty, and always looking out for him. Shikimori is his knight in shining armor.

name: Kimimaro Kaguya
description: Kimimaro was the fifth member of the Sound Four, thus temporarily changing their group name to the Sound Five. The original four were forced to accept him against their will, as Kimimaro's combat abilities exceeded all of their skills combined. He was the sole survivor of the Kaguya clan, who could manipulate their bodies' skeletal frame. name: Dot Pixis
description: The highest-ranked Administrator of the Southern Region. Head of the Garrison's Southern Territories, Pixis is a cunning leader with astute insights. However, he is also an alcoholic who is constantly watched over by his aid, [Anka](https://anilist.co/character/84331/Anka-Rheinberger), who constantly scolds him for sleeping and drinking during critical moments.

name: Theoto Rikka
description: __Height:__ 165 cm Theoto Rikka is a platoon leader of the Eighty-Sixth Strike Package's Spearhead Squadron and the artist of the squadron member's Personal Marks. name: Neko

She even stated that she does not like wearing clothes, the reason being that "Clothes are too restricting". She is also a mysterious girl, who is also a cat. name: Canary
description: __Height:__ 164 cm (5′4.5) A servant to the Zoldyck family. She believes their difference in status means they will never be close. Unbeknownst to her, Killua regards her as a dear friend. She is initially introduced as a ruthless guardian who does not hesitate to attack trespassers, but, as noted by Gon, she is not as heartless as she pretends to be, and just for a fraction of a second, her eyes convey gentleness or concern, although she tries to suppress it.

name: Jabber Wonger
nativeName: ジャバー・ウォンガー
description: __Affiliation:__ Vandals __Height:__ 183 cm __Jinki:__ Mankira Jabber is a Giver and is a member of the Vandals, a criminal group of givers. He is known to be an unhinged psychopath and has a violent obsession with battle; always being eager to enter a fight with a wide grin and only acknowledging those that are strong enough to compete with him. He is also a masochist, being labeled as a "super masochist" by Rudo, and finds excitement and ecstasy through pain.
